tasks.label: pytest: Unit-Tests (tests/unit/, schnell)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=2048 AURIK_BATCH_FILES=12 AURIK_CHUNK_LIMIT=0 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_chunked_safe.sh" tests/unit --timeout=30 --tb=short -qq -o console_output_style=count --maxfail=3 -x

tasks.label: pytest: Integrations-Tests (ohne E2E/ML)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=3072 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=250 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests -m "not e2e and not ml" -p no:xdist --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=30 --tb=short -q --disable-warnings --no-header --maxfail=20 --ignore=tests/unit

tasks.label: pytest: Vollsuite (2 Worker, Terminal — NICHT für Test Explorer)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=14 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=220 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests -n 2 --dist=loadfile --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=60 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --maxfail=3 -x

tasks.label: pytest: Vollsuite STABIL (seriell, low-overhead)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_BATCH_FILES=8 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_MEM_GB=20 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_SWAP_MB=6144 AURIK_CHUNK_LIMIT=0 AURIK_ULTRA_QUIET=1 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_chunked_safe.sh" tests --timeout=45 --tb=short -qq -o console_output_style=count --maxfail=3 -x --ignore=tests/unit/test_phase23_shared_deadline.py

tasks.label: pytest: Vollsuite ULTRA-STABIL (max Crash-Schutz)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=2048 AURIK_BATCH_FILES=4 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_CHUNK_LIMIT=0 AURIK_ULTRA_QUIET=1 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_chunked_safe.sh" tests --timeout=45 --tb=short -qq -o console_output_style=count --maxfail=3 -x --ignore=tests/unit/test_phase23_shared_deadline.py

tasks.label: pytest: OOM-Isolat phase23_shared_deadline
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=24 AURIK_SWAP_MB=8192 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_safe.sh" tests/unit/test_phase23_shared_deadline.py --timeout=60 --tb=short -qq -o console_output_style=count -x

tasks.label: pytest: Musical Goals (tests/musical_goals/ + tests/unit/)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=3072 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=250 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/musical_goals tests/unit -p no:xdist --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=30 --tb=short -q --disable-warnings --no-header

tasks.label: pytest: Chunk A (unit + musical_goals)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=3072 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=250 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/unit tests/musical_goals -p no:xdist --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=30 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --maxfail=5

tasks.label: pytest: Chunk B (integration + normative)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=14 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=240 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/integration tests/normative -p no:xdist -m "not e2e and not ml" --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=45 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --maxfail=5

tasks.label: pytest: Full Spec Gate (integration + normative, ungefiltert)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=300 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/integration tests/normative -p no:xdist --run-heavy-tests --run-gui-tests --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=90 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --show-capture=no --maxfail=5

tasks.label: pytest: Spec Gate CORE (ohne AMRB)
tasks.command: "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/integration tests/normative -p no:xdist --run-heavy-tests --run-gui-tests -m "not amrb and not competitive" --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=90 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --show-capture=no --maxfail=5

tasks.label: pytest: AMRB Gate (separat, langlaufend)
tasks.command: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=250 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/normative/test_amrb_ci_gate.py -p no:xdist --run-heavy-tests --run-gui-tests --timeout=600 --tb=short -q --disable-warnings --no-header --show-capture=no --maxfail=1

tasks.label: pytest: Competitive Gate (separat, langlaufend)
tasks.command: AURIK_COMPETITIVE_BENCHMARK_TIMEOUT_S=660 AURIK_COMPETITIVE_BENCHMARK_GRACE_S=75 QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=250 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/normative/test_competitive_ci_gate.py -p no:xdist --run-heavy-tests --run-gui-tests --timeout=1200 --tb=short -q --disable-warnings --no-header --show-capture=no --maxfail=1

tasks.label: pytest: Chunk C (restliche tests/, ohne unit+goals+integration)
tasks.command: while IFS= read -r -d '' d; do if find "$d" -type f -name "test_*.py" -print -quit | grep -q .; then "${workspaceFolder}/.venv_aurik/bin/python" -m pytest "$d" -p no:xdist -m "not e2e and not ml" --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --collect-only -q >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; if [[ $rc -eq 5 ]]; then continue; elif [[ $rc -ne 0 ]]; then exit $rc; fi; AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=4096 AURIK_BATCH_FILES=8 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_MEM_GB=20 AURIK_OOM_RETRY_SWAP_MB=6144 AURIK_CHUNK_LIMIT=0 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_chunked_safe.sh" "$d" -p no:xdist -m "not e2e and not ml" --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=45 --tb=short -qq -o console_output_style=count --maxfail=5 || exit $?; fi; done < <(find "${workspaceFolder}/tests" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d ! -name unit ! -name musical_goals ! -name integration ! -name normative -print0 | sort -z)

tasks.label: pytest: Chunk HEAVY (ml/slow/e2e, manuell)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=6144 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=180 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests -p no:xdist -m "ml or slow or e2e" --run-heavy-tests --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=90 --tb=line -q --disable-warnings --no-header --maxfail=3 -x

tasks.label: pytest: Real-Audio-Gate (UAT R5-R12)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=16 AURIK_SWAP_MB=6144 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=180 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" tests/test_uat_acceptance_criteria.py -p no:xdist -k "test_restoration_criteria and (R5 or R6 or R7 or R8 or R9 or R10 or R11 or R12)" --run-heavy-tests --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=180 --tb=short -v --disable-warnings --no-header

tasks.label: pytest: Smoke-Test (50 Tests, maxfail=3)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=12 AURIK_SWAP_MB=2048 AURIK_BATCH_FILES=12 AURIK_CHUNK_LIMIT=1 "${workspaceFolder}/run_tests_chunked_safe.sh" tests/unit --timeout=20 --tb=line -qq -o console_output_style=count --maxfail=3 -x

tasks.label: worldclass: KPI Dashboard
tasks.command: "${workspaceFolder}/.venv_aurik/bin/python" scripts/worldclass_kpi_dashboard.py --repo-root . --threshold-config config/worldclass_kpi_thresholds.json --out-dir reports/worldclass

tasks.label: worldclass: Release Gate
tasks.command: "${workspaceFolder}/.venv_aurik/bin/python" scripts/worldclass_release_gate.py --dashboard-json reports/worldclass/worldclass_kpi_dashboard.json

tasks.label: worldclass: Autopilot Pipeline (E2E)
tasks.command: "${workspaceFolder}/.venv_aurik/bin/python" scripts/worldclass_autopilot_pipeline.py --repo-root . --create-plan --execute-wp1 --max-cases 5 --max-seconds 8 --ml-runtime-budget-s 20

tasks.label: pytest: Aktive Test-Datei (Editor)
tasks.command: AURIK_MEM_GB=10 AURIK_SWAP_MB=2048 AURIK_STREAM_TO_TERMINAL=0 AURIK_TERMINAL_LINE_BUDGET=200 "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/pytest_clean.sh" "${file}" -p no:xdist --override-ini="addopts=--strict-markers --import-mode=importlib" --timeout=30 --tb=short -v --disable-warnings --no-header
